communityconfiguration-abstractwikisugge: The list of HTML-returning Wikifunctions (by ZID) offered in the Abstract Article "Add fragment" menu. Up to ten entries.
Up to ten HTML-returning Wikifunctions by their ZID (for example Z20756) to feature in the Abstract Article fragment menu.
wikilambda-abstract-error-bad-fragments-: The section with key '$1' has a badly typed fragment list.
wikilambda-abstract-error-bad-qid: The value of the 'qid' property ('$1') is not a valid Wikidata Item Qid.
wikilambda-abstract-error-nonexistent-qi: The Wikidata item $1 does not exist. Please select a valid Wikidata item before publishing.
wikilambda-abstract-error-bad-section-co: The section with key '$1' has invalid content.
wikilambda-abstract-error-bad-section-in: The section with key '$1' has an invalid index number ('$2').
wikilambda-abstract-error-bad-section-qi: The section key '$1' is not a valid Wikidata Item Qid.
wikilambda-abstract-error-invalid-conten: The provided content is not a valid Abstract Article.
wikilambda-abstract-error-invalid-json: The Abstract Article is not a valid JSON.
wikilambda-abstract-error-invalid-title: The provided title '$1' is not valid for an Abstract Article.
wikilambda-abstract-error-missing-lede-s: The Abstract Article object must have a lede section (Q8776414).
wikilambda-abstract-error-missing-sectio: The section with key '$1' has no fragments.
The Abstract Article must have at least one section.
wikilambda-abstract-error-unmatching-qid: The value of the 'qid' property ('$1') does not match the page title '$2'
wikilambda-abstract-fragment-function-se: Only functions that return a $2 ($1) are listed.
[[abstract:Help:How_to_create_an_article|How to use a function with a different return type]]
This field expects a function which returns a $2 ($1). Only functions with that return type are shown in the search.
wikilambda-abstract-menu-fragments-acces: Menu for selecting and adding a new fragment
wikilambda-abstract-preview-fragment-max: Reached max retries. Try again later.
wikilambda-abstract-special-create-exist: There is already an Abstract Article for that Wikidata Item:
You were redirected as there is already an Abstract Article.
wikilambda-abstract-special-create-intro: Make sure that you follow [[$1|community policies]], including copyright rules.
wikilambda-abstract-special-create-not-e: The creation of Abstract Articles is not currently enabled. Please check back later.
wikilambda-abstract-special-create-qid: Create a New Abstract Article for $1
wikilambda-abstract-special-preview-bad-: The code "$1" is not a valid language code or is not supported in Abstract Wikipedia.
The identifier "$1" is not a valid Wikidata Item identifier (Qid).
wikilambda-abstract-special-preview-empt: This article was last updated as of $1 but this section has not yet been rendered for this language. Please try again later. [[Why is this not immediate?]]
This section is not yet rendered
wikilambda-abstract-special-preview-miss: The url should have language and topic Qid. E.g. "Special:PreviewAbstract/en/Q42"
wikilambda-abstract-special-preview-not-: The preview of Abstract Articles is not enabled in this environment, or is temporarily disabled.
The article preview for the topic $1 in $2 has not been generated yet. Please try again later.
This article preview is not ready yet.
wikilambda-abstract-special-preview-prov: Last updated from Abstract Wikipedia as of $1
wikilambda-abstract-special-preview-unsu: The language "$1" has not yet been included in the list of languages for which Abstract Wikipedia articles are generated. [[See list of enabled languages]]
This language is not supported yet.
The topic $1 does not have an Abstract Article, or it has not yet been included in the list of topics for which Abstract Wikipedia articles are generated. [[See list of enabled topics]]
This topic is not supported yet.
